prompt:
This is a no-tool vanilla LLM RBAC baseline. Use only the RBAC policy text pasted here.
Decide whether each requested operation is allowed. Deny-by-default applies when no rule allows an operation.

RBAC policy text:
Policy ID: RBAC_DEMO_001

Rules:
- rule_id: DENY_NON_ADMIN_RBAC_WRITE
  operation: write
  path_pattern: src/rbac/*
  min_role: admin
  effect: deny
  source_priority: 1000

- rule_id: DENY_NON_ADMIN_RBAC_DELETE
  operation: delete
  path_pattern: src/rbac/*
  min_role: admin
  effect: deny
  source_priority: 1000

- rule_id: DENY_NON_ADMIN_POLICIES_WRITE
  operation: write
  path_pattern: src/policies/*
  min_role: admin
  effect: deny
  source_priority: 1000

- rule_id: DENY_NON_ADMIN_REQUIREMENTS_WRITE
  operation: write
  path_pattern: src/requirements/*
  min_role: admin
  effect: deny
  source_priority: 1000

- rule_id: ALLOW_EDITOR_WRITE_SRC
  operation: write
  path_pattern: src/*
  min_role: editor
  effect: allow
  source_priority: 100

- rule_id: ALLOW_ADMIN_WRITE_ANY
  operation: write
  path_pattern: *
  min_role: admin
  effect: allow
  source_priority: 10

- rule_id: ALLOW_ADMIN_DELETE_ANY
  operation: delete
  path_pattern: *
  min_role: admin
  effect: allow
  source_priority: 10


Probes:
- RBAC-001: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/rbac/RBAC_DEMO_001.md
- RBAC-002: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/policies/P-001.md
- RBAC-003: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/requirements/RQ-001.md
- RBAC-004: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/trpc/init.ts
- RBAC-005: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/trpc/query-client.ts
- RBAC-006: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/trpc/routers/_app.ts
- RBAC-007: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/inngest/client.ts
- RBAC-008: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts
- RBAC-009: role=viewer, operation=write, path=src/app/api/inngest/route.ts
- RBAC-010: role=viewer, operation=write, path=README.md
- RBAC-011: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/rbac/RBAC_DEMO_001.md
- RBAC-012: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/policies/P-001.md
- RBAC-013: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/requirements/RQ-001.md
- RBAC-014: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/trpc/init.ts
- RBAC-015: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/trpc/query-client.ts
- RBAC-016: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/trpc/routers/_app.ts
- RBAC-017: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/inngest/client.ts
- RBAC-018: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts
- RBAC-019: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=src/app/api/inngest/route.ts
- RBAC-020: role=viewer, operation=delete, path=README.md

Return JSON exactly with this shape:
{
  "decisions": [
    {"probe_id": "RBAC-001", "allowed": false, "rationale": "short reason"}
  ]
}
